title: anthemis chrysantha subsp. jimenezii
intro: Anthemis chrysantha subsp. jimenezii, also known as Anthemis chrysantha jimenezii, is a plant species within the daisy family that is native to the mountainous regions of Spain. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Anthemis chrysantha subsp. jimenezii include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and soothe digestive issues, as well as its potential to treat respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of this plant often involve infusions or decoctions, and it can be used as a tea or applied topically to the skin in the form of creams or salves.
